violations.description: General employee practices. — --Employee failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. > Observed employee handling clean dishes and dirty dishes without handwashing. Observed employee cough into hands and continue to handle clean dishes without handwashing.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food * was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. > Observed raw chicken next to open container of raw fish in prep station cooler. Corrected with employee.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. > Storage table was not in good repair in the back of the kitchen. Visibly peeling and pulling apart underneath. > Lid covering the chip container visibly cracked. > Cold hold prep table has liner on the inside door that needs peeled off.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. > Vegetable chopper in the kitchen was being held in cleaned dishes area while visibly was dirty. > Cutting board being stored was in need of washing.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. > The sinks floor drain in the prep area of the kitchen is currently using a strainer to cover the drain and catch food items. Repair the drain.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. > The walls in the prep area of the kitchen are in need of some cleaning. Visible splatter on walls. Visible splatter on the mini split HVAC unit.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. > Floor towards the back door is missing floor tiling that creates a gap for insects to enter the building.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
